PartitionName=cpu-shared AllowAccounts=ALL Hidden=NO AllowQos=normal,high,express
PartitionName=cpu-highmem AllowAccounts=ALL Hidden=NO AllowQos=normal
PartitionName=gpu-shared AllowAccounts=ALL Hidden=NO AllowQos=gpu,interactive
PartitionName=gpu-highend AllowAccounts=ALL Hidden=NO AllowQos=gpu
PartitionName=debug AllowAccounts=restricted Hidden=YES AllowQos=interactive
